title: Khata Manifest
description: PLACEHOLDER — JSON Schema for the manifest.json file at the root of every .khata archive. This placeholder captures the high-level structure. The final schema will be finalized once the Bahi reference implementation completes Phase 1 and the exact field set is locked. Until then, implementations should follow the example in khata-format.md and the Bahi spec §3.2, and expect field additions in the minor version range.

khataFormatVersion.description: The .khata format version this file conforms to. Follows semantic versioning.

schemaVersion.description: Internal SQLite schema version. Bumped when books.sqlite structure changes.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of when the file was first created. Immutable after creation.

lastModifiedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent save.

company.description: Current company identity. Historical identity snapshots live on individual transactions; this block is the current state only.

name.description: Current legal name of the company

tradeName.description: Current trade name if different from legal name

gstin.description: 15-character GSTIN; null if company is not GST-registered

tan.description: 10-character TAN; optional, required only for TDS deductors

stateName.description: Human-readable state name (denormalized from state reference data)

gstinStateCode.description: 2-digit GSTIN state code; derivable from GSTIN first two characters

compositionScheme.description: True if company is registered under the GST composition scheme

uiTier.description: Progressive unlock tier for user-facing UI

auditLog.description: Append-only log of every state-changing action. See audit-log.md for the detailed format.

origin.description: The origin URL from which the change was made (e.g., https://bahi.naklitechie.com or file://...)

ref.description: Optional reference to the affected entity (e.g., invoice number)

changes.description: Optional diff for edit actions; shape depends on action type

reason.description: Optional free-text reason for the change

hash.description: SHA-256 hash of (previous hash || entry content); used for hash chain verification

modeHistory.description: Record of when this file was opened in Owner vs CA mode

booksHash.description: SHA-256 hash of the current books.sqlite content

signedBy.description: Public key of the keypair that signed the most recent audit log entry

invoiceSeries.description: Multiple concurrent invoice numbering series (domestic, export, SEZ, etc.). See Bahi spec §10.16.

periodLocks.description: Periods for which returns have been filed and entries are locked. See Bahi spec §10.3.

financialYears.description: Record of financial years with opening/closing balances. See Bahi spec §10.4.
